user.title: Smart Heating Advisor — Ollama
user.description: Step 1 of 5 — Configure your local Ollama AI instance

influxdb.title: Smart Heating Advisor — InfluxDB
influxdb.description: Step 2 of 5 — Configure your InfluxDB 2.x connection

rooms.title: Smart Heating Advisor — Select Rooms
rooms.description: Step 3 of 5 — Select the rooms (HA Areas) you want SHA to manage. SHA will auto-detect temperature sensors and TRVs assigned to each area. Leave empty to skip and configure rooms later.

room_entities.title: Smart Heating Advisor — {room_name} Entities
room_entities.description: Step 4 of 5 — Confirm the entities detected for **{room_name}**. SHA will create helper entities and a blueprint automation for this room. Leave sensors blank if none were detected — you can configure them in the automation later.

entities.title: Smart Heating Advisor — HA Entities
entities.description: Step 5 of 5 — Configure global HA entities used for weather context in AI analysis.

error.ollama_connection_failed: Cannot connect to Ollama or model not found. Check URL and model name.
error.influxdb_connection_failed: Cannot connect to InfluxDB. Check URL, token, org and bucket.
error.entity_not_found: Entity not found in Home Assistant. Check the entity ID.

abort.already_configured: Smart Heating Advisor is already configured.

user.title: Add Room — Select Area
user.description: Select an HA Area to use as a room. SHA will auto-detect temperature sensors and TRVs. Already-configured rooms are excluded. Choose **➕ Create room manually** if the room is not yet an HA Area.

entities.title: Add Room — {room_name} Entities
entities.description: Confirm the entities detected for **{room_name}**. SHA will create helper entities and a blueprint automation. Leave sensors blank if none were detected — you can configure them in the automation later.

manual.title: Add Room — Manual Setup
manual.description:
Enter a name for the new room and optionally select its entities. Entities can also be configured later in the room automation.

{tip}

error.room_already_exists: A room with this name is already configured in SHA. Use a different name.

abort.no_areas_available: No HA Areas are available to add. Either all areas are already configured in SHA, or no areas exist yet. Use the manual option to add a room without an area, or create areas first in Settings → Areas.

init.title: Smart Heating Advisor — Settings
init.description: Update global settings. Use the **➕ Add Room** button on the integration card to add rooms, or click **⋮** next to a room to remove it.

data_description.debug_logging: Writes detailed logs for entity creation, room discovery, InfluxDB queries, Ollama prompts and responses, and heating rate updates. Disable when not actively debugging.
data_description.influxdb_token: Changes to connection settings (Ollama, InfluxDB, weather entity) will trigger an integration reload.
data_description.ollama_url: Changes to connection settings (Ollama, InfluxDB, weather entity) will trigger an integration reload.
